comments: Missing about twenty minutes of the show after the initial track

Tommy offers a young teenage girl listener the chance to accompany himself and his wife to this year's Monsters Of Rock Festival if she can get permission to come to London from her parents (wonder if she took him up on the offer?)

sessions.details: recorded 6 April 1984, produced by Tony Wilson, engineered Dave Dade. Rob Armitage (vocals), Neil Saxton (guitar), Paul Smith (bass), Andy Barrott (keyboards), Tony Sugden (drums)

track_listing.track: cuts into the end of Underground Zero session track (Between Worlds) from 17 August 1984 show, then several tracks from bands at the next day's MOR festival at Donington (Motley Crue, Accept, Y&T, Van Halen, AC/DC)
16 (after the pips) returns to 20 April show, and cuts into;
Baby Let The Good Times Roll
Repeat Of Climax Blues Band Live At Reading 1983
